title: Finance — CAPM
description: Capital Asset Pricing Model formula, interpretation table, and process diagram.

blocks.title: Symbols
blocks.markdown:
| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|--------|
| R_f | Risk-free rate |
| β_i | Asset beta vs market |
| E[R_m] | Expected market return |
| E[R_i] | Required / expected return |

blocks.title: Apply CAPM
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Get Rf] --> B[Estimate beta]
  B --> C[Estimate E Rm]
  C --> D[Compute E Ri]
  D --> E[Compare to forecast]
